data.title: iFLYTEK Launches AI Translation Earbuds in the U.S.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, iFLYTEK Co., Ltd., a leading global AI firm focusing on speech and language technologies, unveiled its AI Translation Earbuds in the United States. These earbuds are tailored for cross-border business and daily multilingual communication needs. The innovative product aims to assist users in overcoming language barriers effortlessly.

data.title: Rt. Hon. Dame Jacinda Ardern, Former Prime Minister of New Zealand, joins LawZero's Global Advisory Council
data.description: On March 5, 2026, LawZero made public the selection of the Rt. Hon. Dame Jacinda Ardern, the ex-Prime Minister of New Zealand, to their Global Advisory Council. This nomination puts Dame Ardern alongside other prominent figures in LawZero's leadership, showing the company's dedication to gathering a diverse and experienced council.

data.title: Crypto venture giant A16z plans 5th fund, looks to close by mid-2026 as rivals explore new technologies.
data.description: A major cryptocurrency investment firm has introduced its fifth venture fund, aiming to finalize the fund by mid-2026, as reported by insiders.

data.title: Bitwise donates $380K to open-source Bitcoin developers, working with Bitcoin Brink, OpenSats, and Human Rights Foundation for distribution.
data.description: Bitwise has entrusted Bitcoin Brink, OpenSats, and the Human Rights Foundation with the responsibility of determining the allocation of its second annual donation to back Bitcoin.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Tether invests $50M in AI sleep tracking company Eight Sleep, valuing it at $1.5B and integrating tech through QVAC architecture.
data.description: In a recent funding round, Eight Sleep secured a $50 million investment led by Tether. The partnership aims to incorporate AI health technology into Eight Sleep's products using its QVAC architecture.
